_comment: Shipped preset for SD1.5 image-to-image. Outer graph: LoadImage #10 → VAEEncode #11 → KSampler #3 (denoise=0.75 baked in) → VAEDecode #8 → SaveImage #9. Bindings hook ImageStage's first upstream image into LoadImage, main_prompt into the positive CLIPTextEncode, seed → KSampler. Sizing follows the input image (VAEEncode is shape-preserving), so no `computed:width/height` here.
label: Local SD1.5 I2I
description: Stable Diffusion 1.5 image-to-image. Wire a reference image into the stage's images input; write the prompt describing what you want changed. Denoise strength is fixed at 0.75 in the workflow; tweak by editing the KSampler widget directly if needed.

image.error: Image-to-image needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's images input.

text.default: a stylised version of the input image
